variants.name: ubuntu-claude-code
variants.title: Ubuntu + XFCE/RDP + Claude Code (base)
variants.description: The single base runner. Installs the Ubuntu desktop (XFCE/xrdp/x11vnc), Node, and the Claude Code CLI — a complete, dispatch-free agent you can RDP into and run `claude` on manually. Every optional capability (SideButton MCP server, Chrome, the SideButton extension, knowledge packs, MCP plugins, and toolchains like .NET 9 / Docker / psql) is layered on as a COMPONENT selected via AGENT_COMPONENTS. See components.json and docs/COMPONENTS.md.

display.name: SideButton Agent
display.description: Ubuntu + Claude Code base — capabilities added as components
